     appending `?template=new-agent.md` to the compare URL. -->

## What changed

<!-- One-line summary. Is this an edit to an existing topic, a new topic, or tooling? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited `<topic>/knowledge.md` — **not** `claude.md`, `codex.md`, or `copilot.md` directly.
- [ ] I ran `bash scripts/sync.sh` and committed the regenerated files.
- [ ] New or changed facts are sourced from an upstream page I can cite in a `Full docs: <url>` footer.
- [ ] If content changed materially, I bumped `Last audited: YYYY-MM-DD` in the topic's `knowledge.md`.
- [ ] CI (`verify`, `links`) is green.
